text:
Created attachment 201414
update to 18.4.0.339.1532

* Update databases/datamodeler from 18.1.0.082.1035 to 18.4.0.339.1532
  version
* New dependency on openjfx8-devel package
* Portlint suggestions: add USES=gnome
* Modify the find command to build the stage area:
    - Ignore *.orig files
    - Linux library files .so are not installed, are they are useless

Release notes:
https://www.oracle.com/technetwork/developer-tools/datamodeler/downloads/data-modeler-relnotes-184-5227117.html
